**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Triggering the 'Guangcai Mega Market' second-floor extremum and the disastrous falsification of the 'Medium-sized Enterprise' tag. The fake Apple global supply chain ecosystem in the original data has been uprooted. This is an extremely deformed commercial node: the official classification rated it as a 'Medium-sized Enterprise' with strong industrial capacity and categorized it under the 'Electronic Component Manufacturing' broad category. Its business license is filled with hardcore 'manufacturing': power electronic component manufacturing, industrial automatic control system device manufacturing, mechanical and electrical equipment manufacturing. If one only looks at the tags, this is a legitimate medium-sized electromechanical plant. However, the forensic probe directly grabbed its physical bottom line: an insured headcount of 0 people! The paid-in capital is a pitiful 70,000 RMB. Even more fatal is its spatial probe: '2nd Floor, Building 14, Guangcai Mega Market, Fucheng Town, Fengyang County, Chuzhou City.' 'Guangcai Mega Market' is a highly representative wholesale market for small commodities, building materials, and hardware in China. '2nd Floor, Building 14' means this is just a shop or warehouse located on the second floor of a hardware wholesale market. In a second-floor single room of a wholesale market, using 70,000 RMB, without hiring a single worker, to establish a 'medium-sized manufacturing enterprise' and produce heavy mechanical and electrical equipment? This is not just padding in commercial registration, but a severe rollover of the official classification algorithm. Piercing all 'manufacturing' disguises, the probe found its true way of survival at the end of its license: 'sales of electrical instruments and meters, sales of power electronic components.' The truth is irrefutable: this is absolutely not a medium-sized manufacturing plant, but a 0-Employee Wholesale Market Shell & Hardware Broker operating a shell shop on the second floor of a hardware market. The boss rented a shop on the second floor of the market, acting purely as a middleman buying and selling electrical wires, meters, and hardware accessories. All the 'Medium-sized Enterprise' and 'Manufacturing' halos bestowed by officials have now been subjected to deep demotion and thorough circuit-breaking by the system.
